_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for Edgy Content That Converts. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words 'Inter', 'Inter Regular', 'Inter Display Bold', 'JetBrains Mono', 'sans serif', or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. Do not render the bracket characters as part of any word; only render the actual word text.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-left headline across two lines, occupying upper third only: line 1 reads 'Edgy Content', line 2 reads 'That Converts'.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel directly below the headline, one short line: 5-tier risk spectrum. 50 hooks. Built to filter, not to flatter.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the lower 60 percent of the cover):
A stylized 5-tier risk spectrum visualization. Five horizontal bars stacked vertically, each progressively wider as it descends, telegraphing increasing risk and increasing reach.

The bar structure:
- Bar 1 (top, narrowest, roughly 35% of frame width): cool indigo #4338CA fill at 35% opacity, thin off-white #FAF9FF outline.
- Bar 2 (slightly wider, roughly 50% of frame width): blended indigo-violet #6D28D9 fill at 40% opacity, thin off-white outline.
- Bar 3 (middle, roughly 65% of frame width): electric purple #7C3AED fill at 50% opacity, thin off-white outline.
- Bar 4 (wider, roughly 80% of frame width): magenta-purple #A21CAF fill at 60% opacity, thin off-white outline.
- Bar 5 (bottom, widest, roughly 95% of frame width): bright magenta-pink #DB2777 fill at 70% opacity, thin off-white outline.
- All bars are clean rounded rectangles with consistent corner radius. Vertical spacing between bars is even. Each bar is the same vertical thickness.
- Bars are left-aligned, all sharing a common left edge that aligns with the headline's left margin above.

The 'you are here' marker:
- A single bright cyan #06B6D4 circle marker, roughly 1.5x the bar thickness, positioned ON the third bar (the middle tier) at approximately the 70% horizontal position of that bar.
- The circle has a soft cyan glow ring around it, suggesting active selection.
- The circle is filled with bright cyan, with a thin white outline.
- No text or numbers inside the circle.

No labels, numbers, or text inside or beside any of the five bars. The bars are pure visual structure carrying the meaning.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing. Smaller than a typical full-cover hero headline because the bar visualization is the centerpiece.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium editorial cover with the bar visualization as the topic-specific centerpiece, echoing the system-illustration style of P09 Multi-Agent Playbook (where a hexagon-and-nodes diagram telegraphed the agent network).
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: pill + headline + subtitle panel in upper third, 5-tier bar visualization dominates the lower 60 percent, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- The bars ARE the geometry of this cover. There is no diagonal accent line and no WHAT IS INSIDE pill grid.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No diagonal cyan accent line crossing the frame. The bar visualization replaces that motif entirely.
- No grid of small text pills (no WHAT IS INSIDE row). The bars replace that pattern.
- No literal brand logos. No emoji icons. No icons of phones, megaphones, lightning bolts, fire, or warning triangles.
- No human faces, no avatars, no illustrations of people.
- No code text rendered.
- No clip art, no realistic illustrations of laptops or screens.
- No text or numbering inside or beside the bars; they are pure visual placeholders, not labeled.
- No reuse of motifs from P32, P33, or P35 sibling covers (no diagonal cyan accent line, no pill grid, no flow-of-nodes pattern).

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away 'Edgy Content That Converts'. Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text.
- No font names or typography labels.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the 5-tier bar visualization design.

On the left two-thirds: an abstract repetition of the 5-tier risk spectrum motif rendered at low opacity. Five horizontal bars stacked vertically, progressively widening from top to bottom, gradient-shifting from cool indigo at the top to magenta-pink at the bottom, all at roughly 18 percent opacity. A single bright cyan #06B6D4 dot marker positioned on the middle bar, with a soft glow ring.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no megaphone or lightning-bolt icons, no fire or warning emoji icons.
- The 5-tier bar visualization is the recurring motif but rendered subtly so the PDF mockup remains the focal point.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads 'Edgy Content', line 2 reads 'That Converts'. Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: 5-tier risk spectrum, 100-point pre-post rubric, 50 scroll-stopping hooks
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Filters · Risk Spectrum · Scoring Rubric · Templates · Avoid List · Recovery · Hook Vault
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Stages strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees. On the right third, an abstract version of the 5-tier risk spectrum: five progressively widening horizontal bars stacked vertically, gradient-shifting from cool indigo at the top to magenta-pink at the bottom, all at low opacity (about 22 percent). A single bright cyan dot marker on the middle bar with a soft glow ring.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no brand logos, no fire or megaphone or lightning icons, no emoji.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.
- No reuse of the diagonal cyan accent line motif from P35 or earlier sibling cards.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract 5-tier risk spectrum composition: five progressively widening horizontal bars stacked vertically across the central horizontal band of the banner. Bar 1 narrowest at top, bar 5 widest at bottom. Color gradient from cool indigo through electric purple to magenta-pink as bars descend. Each bar with thin off-white outlines and translucent fills.
- Three bright cyan #06B6D4 dot markers placed at varying horizontal positions on bars 2, 3, and 4, each with a soft glow ring, suggesting different content choices across the spectrum.
- Spread the bar structure to fill the frame edge-to-edge.
- Subtle paper grain.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind.
- No text or labels inside or around any of the bars.
- No emoji, no clip art, no illustrations of people.
- No diagonal accent line crossing the frame.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
